author: Samuel Vaillant
subject: feat(search): allow the search only with Derived Helpers (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#704)
body:
* test(derive): use factory for the client

* feat(search): allow to search with derived helpers only

* test(derive): update names of the tests

* test(derive): remove extra wording
